\tzpentry{ID3860}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3860 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\Delta\phi(\chi)}{\phi_c} = \frac{(5\pi/27)}{(\pi/6)} = \frac{10}{9}. \end{equation}
